_cite.reason: 4c: relabel unlabeled workspace-analysis to labeled analysis (g1 §6); every binding sentence judged WORKSPACE_ANALYSIS

prior.content_md:
**MONITORING — ReFuelEU Aviation reporting tool (EASA)**

The European Union Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) has published the ReFuelEU Aviation Digital Reporting Tool for compliance reporting under Regulation (EU) 2023/2405. This is a live system, not a pending event, but its ongoing development and any updates to reporting requirements warrant tracking.

*Source: EASA ReFuelEU Aviation Digital Reporting Tool. https://www.easa.europa.eu/en/domains/environment/refueleu-aviation-digital-reporting-tool

**MONITORING — Harmonised transport emissions calculation framework**

The European Commission reached political agreement in November 2025 on a regulation to harmonise transport emissions calculations across modes in the EU (COM(2023) 441 final). undefined This regulation, once in force, will establish the methodology the workspace must use when reporting transport Scope 3 emissions to clients subject to CSRD. The legislative train status and expected in-force date should be tracked.

*Source: European Commission DG MOVE, "Commission welcomes political agreement on new rules to harmonise transport emissions calculations in the EU," November 2025. https://transport.ec.europa.eu/news-events/news/commission-welcomes-political-agreement-new-rules-harmonise-transport-emissions-calculations-eu-2025-11-06_en
*Source: European Parliament Legislative Train Schedule — Measurement of transport and logistics emissions. https://www.europarl.europa.eu/legislative-train/spotlight-JD%2023-24/file-measurement-of-transport-and-logistics-emissions

**MONITORING — Fit for 55 component regulation review cycles**

The Commission has indicated it will assess the functioning of specific instruments (including the Social Climate Fund in 2028) and will continue monitoring compliance trajectories for HDV CO₂ standards, FuelEU Maritime, and ReFuelEU Aviation. Review cycles for these instruments could trigger tightening of targets before 2030. The workspace should monitor official Council and Commission channels for review announcements.

*Source: COM(2021) 550 final, Section 2.1, European Commission, 14 July 2021.*
*Source: Council of the European Union — Fit for 55. https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/policies/fit-for-55/
